user.title: Grouw / Daye BLE Mower
user.description: Add a mower by Bluetooth address. If it was discovered by Home Assistant, select it from the list.

pin.title: Enter PIN code
pin.description: Enter the 4-digit PIN code shown on the mower's display. Leave blank if no PIN is set.

error.invalid_address: Enter a Bluetooth address, or select a discovered mower from the list.
error.invalid_pin: Enter a 4-digit PIN code, or leave the field blank if no PIN is set.
